channel.title: Large Files on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Large Files on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Support for workloads with large files in Azure NetApp Files
item.description:
Azure NetApp Files now supports regular volumes with file sizes up to 64 TiB. This is intended for workloads that use large files, including Azure VMware Solution virtual machines with large VMDK disks.

  • Source: Azure Updates
